title: AgentSwitchboard Invocation Request v1
description: Versioned request contract for AgentSwitchboard workstation-agent operations. SysAdminSuite sends this shape; AgentSwitchboard executes the requested operation and returns a normalized result.

execution_profile_id.description: Execution profile from the workstation contract: e.g. 'windows-native', 'linux-native', 'wsl-tmux'

platform.description: Target platform. macOS is explicitly unsupported.

requested_agents.description: Agent IDs to operate on. Must be known supported agents.

operation.description: inventory: detect and report state only. install-missing: detect and install only missing agents. repair-check: assess whether repair is needed. smoke: run per-agent smoke tests.

fixture_mode.description: When true, never contact network, host model providers, or real agent installers. Return fixture data.

evidence_output_dir.description: Optional relative or portable path for sanitized evidence output. Must not be an absolute machine-local path.
